per_question.question: What is the golden source for customer data?
What happens to churned customer data after 36 months?
What type is the customer_id field?
Is the customer_id field mutable?
per_question.answer: No. The customer_id field is explicitly marked as immutable.

per_question.question: What matching algorithm is used for name+address?
What PII classification level applies to customer email?
What is the order status flow?
After which status can order line items no longer be edited?
per_question.answer: After the order reaches the “submitted” status, its line items can no longer be edited.

per_question.question: What decimal precision should be used for financial fields?
What entity does ORDER belong to?
per_question.answer: ORDER belongs to the CUSTOMER entity.

per_question.question: What is the maximum staleness allowed for inventory data?
What happens when an order exceeds $50,000?
per_question.answer: The order is automatically put on hold and an alert is triggered.

per_question.question: What is the SKU identifier type for products?
How is inventory data synced?
per_question.expected: Real-time via warehouse API (webhook + 5min poll fallback)
per_question.answer: In real time from the warehouse API, using webhooks with a 5-minute polling fallback.

per_question.question: Are there any conflicting retention policies?
per_question.expected: Yes - CUSTOMER says 36 months for churned, regulatory requires 7 years for financial records

per_question.question: What is the null policy for the email field?
per_question.answer: Email must never be null for active records (never-null-for-active).

per_question.question: How are timestamps stored and displayed?
per_question.expected: Stored in UTC, displayed in customer locale
per_question.answer: Timestamps are stored in UTC and displayed in the customer’s locale timezone.

per_question.question: How are addresses normalised for US addresses?
What is the PII classification for payment card numbers?
What is the minimum retention period for financial transaction data?
What is the customer return/refund policy?
What GDPR or CCPA compliance rules apply to customer data deletion?
What happens to seasonal products at end of season?
per_question.expected: auto-deactivated, reactivation requires manual review by merchandising
per_question.answer: They are automatically deactivated at the end of the season.

per_question.question: What is the UK address format standard used for normalisation?
Can a PAYMENT exist without an associated ORDER?
per_question.expected: No, order_id is mandatory (PAYMENT belongs to ORDER)
per_question.answer: No. Each PAYMENT has a mandatory order_id (BELONGS-TO @ENTITY-ORDER), so it cannot exist without an associated ORDER.
